appDesc.message: ADHD向け大タスク分解 (テンプレ分解、サブタスク化、達成演出)

popup_template_button.description: Magic wand icon for template breaker.

popup_no_tasks.description: Message shown when there are no tasks.

popup_add_subtask.description: Title for the add-subtask button on a tree node.

popup_add_subtask_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the add-subtask inline input.

popup_toggle_complete.description: ARIA label for the task/subtask completion checkbox.

popup_reward_task_complete.message: タスク完了！おめでとう🎉
popup_reward_task_complete.description: Screen-reader announcement when a top-level task reaches 100% completion.

popup_reward_leaf_complete.description: Screen-reader announcement when an individual leaf subtask is completed.

popup_premium_trial_remaining.message: Premium 体験中 (残り $DAYS$ 日)
popup_premium_trial_remaining.description: Status banner shown to users in the active 7-day trial.

popup_premium_unlocked.description: Status banner for users who purchased Premium.

popup_premium_locked.message: 無料プラン (タスク $LIMIT$ 件まで)
popup_premium_locked.description: Status banner for users on the free tier after trial expired.

popup_premium_upgrade.description: Button label that opens the upgrade flow.

popup_premium_limit_reached.message: 無料プランの上限 ($LIMIT$ 件) に達しました。Premium で無制限に。
popup_premium_limit_reached.description: Inline notice when a free user hits the task cap.

popup_stats_heading.description: Heading of the Premium-only statistics section.

popup_stats_tasks.description: Stats line: completed vs. total top-level tasks.

popup_stats_leaves.description: Stats line: completed vs. total leaf subtasks.
